description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical coffee machine with a modern design, featuring a prominent vertical feed chute at the top and a transparent midsection for monitoring the brewing process. The front displays a spout for dispensing coffee directly into a cup or jug, with a detachable jug placed beside it. The body is primarily composed of dark plastic with some metallic accents, and the base is sturdy to support the appliance. A power cord extends from the rear, indicating its electrical operation, and a side-mounted lever or latch is visible for securing or releasing internal components. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for countertop use in kitchens, offices, or urban cafes.
description: A modern, cylindrical coffee machine with a vertical feed chute, transparent midsection, and a detachable jug, featuring a visible power cord and side lever.
description_view_0: Front view showing the feed chute, dispensing spout, and a jug placed to the left of the machine.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the power cord and the back of the cylindrical body, with the side lever visible.
description_view_2: Back view with the power cord extended and the jug now positioned to the right, showing the rear of the machine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the jug in front and the power cord coiled, showing the side lever and the back of the spout.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'PHILIPS' logo is visible on the front lower section of the machine in white text.
